expect: Zombie false-positive rate drops from 3 domains to 0 after outcome-based filtering
actual: CONFIRMED. Before fix: 3 false-positive zombies (META 12x, NK 8x, CAT 7x — all 100% MERGED). After fix: 0 zombies detected. 68 total DOMEX lanes, 66 MERGED (97%), 2 ABANDONED. question_gen.py _zombie_items() now filters by ABANDONED/STALE status and computes failure rate. L-1102 written (L3 Sh=8).
diff: Prediction MET exactly. False-positive count went from 3 to 0. The deeper finding: false-positive rate was proportional to UCB1 score — Goodhart's law on recurrence measurement. Top-UCB1 domains penalized most by the broken metric.
